chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 32 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For direction 1. For orders on CMA No.739/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.740/2025 (C/A) 06.01.2026 Mr. Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the listed applications. Accordingly, the same are dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
